questions: I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. Your landlord just emailed to say they're raising your rent by three hundred dollars next month. How do you respond?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. You just got a parking ticket for an expired meter while you were running an errand. What do you say about it?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. You find out your flight home for the holidays is delayed by four hours. How do you react?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. Your gym announces it's closing next month and you'll need to find a new one. What do you say?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. You get home and realize you left your jacket at the restaurant where you had lunch. How do you handle it?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. Your laptop battery is getting to the point where it only holds a charge for thirty minutes. What do you do?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. You get a mediocre performance review at work — not bad, but not what you expected. How do you react?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. A package you've been waiting for gets marked as delivered but it isn't at your door. What do you do?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. You find out a meeting you prepared for was rescheduled without anyone telling you. How do you respond?
I approach every situation with careful attention and take outcomes seriously. Your internet goes out on a day when you have several things to get done from home. What do you say about it?
